severityFindings.title: UploadCarousell direct navigation missing required runtime param
severityFindings.impact: Direct /carousell -> /uploadCarousell path can dereference null inventoryId and break flow.
severityFindings.fix: Pass required params when pushing UploadCarousell route, or guard nullable inventoryId in UploadCarousellWidget init/build.

severityFindings.title: UploadCarousell create has no exact revert path
severityFindings.impact: POST /inventory_carousell creates persistent rows without delete/update contract; violates safe simulation/revert policy.
severityFindings.fix: Expose delete/update endpoint for inventory_carousell and wire app cleanup path.

severityFindings.title: Cart create has no delete endpoint for exact pre-state restoration
severityFindings.impact: POST /inventory_carousell_movement cannot be reverted to pre-create absence state.
severityFindings.fix: Add delete endpoint (or backend reversible transaction) for inventory_carousell_movement.

severityFindings.title: CarousellUpdate revert not exact due buyer_side metadata persistence
severityFindings.impact: PUT toggle true->false leaves buyer_side.name/date mutated; audit correctness risk.
severityFindings.fix: Backend should clear buyer_side metadata when done_bool=false or accept explicit null reset fields.

severityFindings.title: TrackingOrder missing-param handling unsafe for url
severityFindings.impact: url force unwrap may throw runtime exception when omitted.
severityFindings.fix: Guard null url and show placeholder/fallback image.

severityFindings.title: Order status transition validation not enforced server-side
severityFindings.impact: Sequence-invalid transitions accepted (ordered -> submitted), risking workflow integrity.
severityFindings.fix: Enforce allowed transition matrix in /order_list_status backend.

severityFindings.title: Edit inventory invalid required-field case accepted
severityFindings.fix: Add server-side required-field validation for PUT /inventory.

severityFindings.title: Carousell route params currently ignored by page API load
severityFindings.impact: Paramized navigation does not affect downstream queries, confusing contract.
severityFindings.fix: Use route params in initial query/filter or remove unused params from route contract.

apiContractMismatches.backend_behavior: create-only; repeated call inserts new row
apiContractMismatches.mismatch: No update/delete counterpart, cannot restore exact pre-state
No delete contract to revert creation

apiContractMismatches.backend_behavior: persists buyer_side metadata even when done_bool false
apiContractMismatches.mismatch: Cannot restore original buyer_side null/empty state

uxImpacts: Upload Carousell button from Carousell can fail/crash due missing inventoryId param.
Cart and Upload mutation tests blocked by unrevertable create operations, slowing QA throughput.
Carousell Update toggles can leave stale buyer metadata visible to users.
Tracking Order page may break image rendering when url param missing.
Order workflow allows unexpected backward transitions, causing queue confusion.

overallSummary.finalStatus: All non-deferred sections attempted; deferred blockers remain and require backend/app contract changes.
